structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-03-28 Home in Five Platinum Program Fully Originated
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-03-28 10:39:24-07:00

 



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

 

The Home in Five Platinum 2025A Program has been fully originated.  Please see below for details:

 

HOW DOES THE WAITLIST WORK?

The Home in 5 Platinum Program is fully originated which means there are no funds for new reservations. At this time, there is a Wait List of $ 4 million that will be available at 10:30am (MT) today. 

 

Loans should only be reserved if closing within the next 30 days.

 

Loans reserved on the Wait List cannot be UW certified and absolutely cannot close until the Lender has been notified that their loan has been moved from the Wait List into the program. As loans fall out we replenish the program funds and notify lenders with loans on the Wait List that funds are available, and if confirmed loan is still active and closing on time, the loan is moved into the program. 

 

 

HOW DO I KNOW WAITLIST FUNDS ARE AVAILABLE?

Daily by 9:00am MT (Monday - Friday excluding holidays) eHousingPlus will post whether or not the waitlist is available that day on the rates/offerings web page. <https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/gvb7kqsab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SqF-Z2W2W5ByANk7x_n7RgghX8bNwk9pM5-QLA1zXVo-G7kZulr2CjQZ0yAGNdoJwR-spRleh4YzQHBQhGwyN_S5Bfc7uf4l7Ate1FfKfJXbA-yRYh_HBC1hyC-ZAZnMEcsF6tXv1RSMwJUW8r7_DeDpScJhhuMLrP9ff6Y5rxFEfIK99PAoBv7NOCgAoiutfabuBWdS8fx7Nam2sAqXGw==&c=jHb4bKzOMMOViJ30pR3WXGLm2ukEq__FTcg6jTlFGCFnuHkVT74WGA==&ch=L8Lql4OUM96djGEIdLCrpBt0jfKkoOrK9TqxXIUpjQViCRcBr65Dhg==__;!!L9-43RkOeiO9WQ!WYO7kkjq4N_5hNQTgpWJrxWmKaS2l4vqot9jTOi93F_ToG9BeWuDsEGq68QqkuBw54nNHctm446cFaIQWwK0_7JT$>  And once funds are originated, we will post that the waitlist is closed. Keep in mind, there may only be funds for one or two loans when the waitlist opens. 

 

 

LOAN CANCELLATIONS

Please cancel a loan that no longer qualifies as soon as you realize the loan is no longer viable in the Home in 5 Platinum Program. A reservation is for a borrower with a specific property. If the borrower or property falls out, the Lender should cancel the loan immediately. Home in 5 Platinum funds cannot be swapped out for a new borrower or property.

 

 

 

 

FOR MORE INFORMATION… 

*	For Underwriting inquiries, contact Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>  
*	For Product inquiries, contact Product <mailto:Productdept@novahomeloans.com> 
*	For Pricing inquiries, contact Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com> 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

To find additional information, follow this path: NOVANet > Capital Markets <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/sites/Home/SitePages/Capital-Markets.aspx>
